idea: Weekly surge in labor union strike mentions in RSS feeds signals industrial sector caution

data.source: RSS news feed counts for labor strike keywords

behavior: An increase in news mentions about labor strikes often precedes operational disruptions in industrial companies.

market_impact.rationale: Rising strike chatter signals potential labor disruptions affecting industrial output.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly RSS strike mentions rise by more than 30% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if mentions drop below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor strike news cycles are frequent and often intensify before resolution or escalation.

idea: Weekly surge in consumer stress Google Trends for 'credit card maxed out' boosts financial sector caution

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'credit card maxed out'

behavior: Rising searches indicate increasing consumer credit stress which can pressure banks.

market_impact.rationale: Worsening consumer credit conditions often reduce banking sector profitability.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if weekly search interest exceeds 20% above 8-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search interest drops below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Consumer credit stress fluctuates frequently with macroeconomic news and policy shifts.

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends for 'home solar panel repair' signals green energy sector rebound

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home solar panel repair'

behavior: Increasing searches reflect rising consumer investment and stress in solar energy equipment maintenance.

market_impact.rationale: Higher maintenance demand signals sustained consumer interest in renewable energy assets.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE if weekly search interest rises 25% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar repair searches spike seasonally and in response to weather or subsidy news.

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port throughput fluctuates weekly with shipping cycles and trade demand.
